name: Calzones
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose your favorite method for making dough.
2. While you're waiting, combine the tomatoes, garlic, and basil, and set aside.
3. Divide the dough into two balls, and roll one into a circle approximately 12-inch in diameter.
4. Layer half of the circle with Parmesan cheese, chicken, tomato mixture, and a generous amount of crumbled feta.
5. Fold the crust over and seal the edges.
6. Repeat with the other half of the dough.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 15-20 minutes.
8. Brush the crusts with melted butter before serving.
This recipe makes two good-sized calzones.
